category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes installing and debugging iOS apps without Xcode.
source_facts.description says it installs and debugs iPhone apps from the command line.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository heading uses ios-deploy.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface for installation, usage, and options.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/ios-control/ios-deploy, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository describes iOS app deployment and debugging without Xcode.
source_facts.description provides install/debug and command-line scope.
